title: Contextualized Search
body: Index every brief, notebook, and source with graph-aware recall so answers arrive with citations and teammates attached.

title: Interactive Assistant
body: Pair with a live project co-pilot that keeps chat grounded in the doc you are reviewing right now.

title: Intelligent Annotations
body: Auto-tag insights, decisions, and blockers directly in the canvas so nothing gets lost in handoff.

title: Paper Reviewer
body: Automate QA passes on new research drops, flagging shaky claims and surfacing missing citations instantly.

title: Writing Agent
body: Co-author memos, briefs, and updates that feel human—blending your best artifacts, tone, and decision history.
